name: @effy/shared-types
description: Effy shared web types — DTOs + the RFC 9457 problem shape (Principle II single source of truth). Internal package: exports TypeScript source, transpiled by each consumer's bundler.

scripts.contract:check: node scripts/gen-kotlin-contract.mjs && git diff --exit-code contract/Dto.kt contract/schema.json
scripts.commerce-contract:check: node scripts/gen-kotlin-commerce-contract.mjs && git diff --exit-code contract/CommerceDto.kt contract/commerce-schema.json
